items.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

items.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

items.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.summary: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 伊朗無人機出現詭異「水母隊形」 美軍F-15飛官證詞引發情報圈熱議
items.summary: 在美伊戰爭期間，一名F-15飛行員3月初在科威特上空遭到誤擊後幸運逃生，4月初駕駛F-15E執行任務時，遭伊朗擊落，美軍為此展開大規模搜救行動，最後成功將飛官救出。知情人士透露，...…

items.title: 中國武漢前反貪高官之子 涉洗錢逾6400萬港幣遭港法庭定罪
items.summary: 中國武漢市1名前反貪腐官員的兒子，因涉嫌洗錢超過6400萬港幣（約新台幣2.6億元），其中包括其父10年前涉嫌向商人索取的400萬人民幣（約新台幣1700萬元）賄款，目前在香...…

items.title: 人口老化解方？德國新提案：2090年代逐步將退休年齡延至70歲
items.summary: 為了因應人口老化並確保退休金制度的未來，德國1項獲得總理梅爾茨（Friedrich Merz）支持的專家建議案指出，德國將在2090年代初期逐步將退休年齡提高至約70歲。 ...…
